## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## 🧪 Testing

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them.

- [ ] Built successfully: `npm run build`
- [ ] Tests passed: `npm run test`
- [ ] CLI works as expected

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests passed locally with my changes
- [ ] My changes don't break backward compatibility (or is a major version bump)

## 📸 Screenshots/Demos

If applicable, add screenshots or demos of the feature.

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## 📦 Additional Context

Any other information relevant to the PR?
